[[BLOCK:slide12_shape1]]
Excessive assumptions about Residuals (残差 (Residual)) and predictor variables  
The model tends to overfit the data.  
When certain predictor variables are highly correlated (Multi-collinearity (多重共线性 (Multi-collinearity))), the model becomes unstable.  
No unique solution exists for large datasets.  
Regarding sample size, the traditional rule of thumb is 1 (predictor variable): 10 (observations); if p > n, Ordinary Least Squares Regression (OLS Regression) (普通最小二乘回归 (OLS Regression)) cannot be performed.  
The model must be linear.
